/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/IG1App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IG1App.dir/IG1App/Viewport.cpp.o -o /home/frampth/Documents/Clase/Curso2/Cuatri2/IG/IG1/IGProjects_x64_VS2022/bin/IG1App  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
